evidence: "Well documented research. Keeps to the point."
"The flashing back and forth between the time periods was very effective."
"Some interesting paradoxes touched upon but not well defined or well developed."
"The two very traumatic events were not convincing due to the haste needed to get everything in a short movie."
"Interesting but overly simplified presentation. Feeds the imagination more than the intellect."
"Bad story line, bad special effects, bad acting."
"Interesting history. For some reason whoever made it fit a wide screen and seriously distorted the images."
"I enjoy Star Trek. This movie did not disappoint."
"Interesting but overly simplified presentation. Feeds the imagination more than the intellect."
"I did not like this movie and did not finish it."
"Bad movie. No wonder people don't like sci-fi."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for documentaries and historical content, appreciating complex narratives but often finding them overly simplified. They are sensitive to production quality and have mixed feelings about emotional engagement, indicating a preference for informative and well-structured presentations.
